title: More People
description: adds new player like mobs based on the world's resources to make your world feel more alive
body:
More people like the name says adds player like mobs to your world mostly based on vanilla resources, currently there are 3 people that have been added:

- oak person - found in oak tree forests
- stone person - found in lush caves, dripstone caves, stoney peaks, and stony shores
- grass person - found in oak forests, plains, flower forests, and dark forests
